trigger: Setter drags card from NEW column to pipeline column
notes: Lead moves from global pool to setter's pipeline; no Slack/CAPI at claim time

trigger: Setter moves lead to CALL_BOOKED or CONFIRMED stage
side_effects: PATCH /api/setter/kanban → CAPI fireCapiEvent(tier=green/qual) + updateMetaLeadStatus(qualified) — NO direct push to closer kanban
notes: Closer kanban reads from leads table (booked=true showed=false) via /api/sales/pipeline-view. Handover is implicit via DB state not a push event.

trigger: PATCH /api/setter/kanban — no extra side effects fired from this specific stage move
side_effects: DB stage stored as WON via toUnifiedStage(); leads.closed not updated by setter kanban PATCH — that happens via /api/closer/outcome

trigger: Setter drags to LOST drop zone
notes: Stored as LOST_NO_FU in unified stage

from_stage: any booking stage (CALL_BOOKED / SELF_BOOKED / SELF_BOOKED_CONFIRMED / BOOKED_AFTER_DIAL)
trigger: Stage move matching BOOKING_STAGES set fires CAPI
side_effects: fireCapiEvent({tier:green}) + updateMetaLeadStatus(qualified) + Overseer surfaces failure on error
notes: Only fires when lead has meta_leadgen_id; CAPI event source=setter_kanban_qualify

trigger: Dialer drags from NEW column to pipeline column
notes: Coaching-client check runs before claim (Stripe + Fanbasis payment cross-ref). No Slack/CAPI at claim time.

trigger: Dialer moves lead to BOOKED stage
side_effects: PATCH /api/dialer/kanban → fireCapiEvent(tier) + updateMetaLeadStatus(qualified) + leads.qualified=true + Slack update on META_LEADS_CHANNEL (auto-resolves action buttons if slack_message_ts exists)
notes: Slack update modifies the original Meta lead card message in #meta-leads-channel. Closer sees lead via /api/sales/pipeline-view (booked=true showed=false).

side_effects: Closer creates entry in lead_pipeline (owner_role=closer stage=FU_IMMEDIATE). Dialer sees it in their READONLY FU_IMMEDIATE column.
notes: Dialer's FU_IMMEDIATE column is read-only (rendered as ReadOnlyStageColumn at 0.62 opacity). Populated by owner_role=closer entries displayed on dialer board.

trigger: Dialer drags to WON outcome bar
notes: No Slack post from dialer WON — that fires from /api/closer/outcome (closed=true) or Stripe/Fanbasis webhooks

side_effects: Closer reads booked+showed+closed flags from leads table via /api/sales/pipeline-view
notes: Sync between dialer CANCEL_NO_SHOW and closer CANCELLED/NO_SHOW is state-based (leads booleans) not event-driven

trigger: Closer drags card within KanbanPipeline or clicks Move button
side_effects: PATCH /api/closer/followup-pipeline/[id] {pipeline_stage:nurture} → updates lead_pipeline stage to FU_NURTURE
notes: No Slack/CAPI. Stored in sales_followup_pipeline (queried via /api/closer/followup-pipeline GET) and lead_pipeline.

trigger: Closer drags a recovery card to a FU column
notes: Drag from read-only recovery column creates a new closer pipeline entry

side_effects: POST /api/closer/outcome → upserts closer_eod_entries + updates leads (booked/showed/closed booleans) + GHL reflection (reflectLeadStage) + immediate Slack post to #sales-calls-closed (Win Bot) if closed=true + Overseer surfaces failure on error
notes: Win Bot replaces legacy Zapier; posts to SALES_CLOSED_CHANNEL C01LB5ELZUH

trigger: Closer logs no-close outcome with follow_up_type
side_effects: POST /api/closer/outcome → records eod entry; if follow_up_type set creates entry in lead_pipeline for follow-up
notes: Drives population of KanbanPipeline FU columns
